_comment: referenceNow anchors the fixture timestamps (created_at values keep their meaning forever). sessionLineages maps each lineage-deposit trace to the session lineage that authored it; the runner mints a real session token per lineage per run, stamps traces.session_id on these rows (imports write it NULL), and derives per-question known-sets from the stamped column. These rows also define the HYGIENE arm split: hygiene-clean = corpus minus these rows.
